manual_recovery_notes: X11 full-FT re-fire FAILED with FUSE EIO crash during post-training checkpoint persistence. Cell 1 (fold0/seed42) trained successfully but on shutil.copytree of checkpoint-545/optimizer.pt (598 MB) from /root/training_staging to /workspace/.../evals/checkpoints/full_ft/, MooseFS returned [Errno 5] Input/output error. Trainer process crashed; orchestrator's checkpoint rsync returned exit-23 (file vanished). Orchestrator pulled 0 trained-rung predictions and 0 checkpoints for full-FT. Per Round 4 user decision after FUSE crash analysis: ABANDON full-FT OOD; ship 2-rung OOD (frozen-probe + LoRA) via the alive pod. Recovery sequence on the same alive pod: (1) rsync UP local frozen-probe + LoRA checkpoints, (2) SSH-fire scripts/run_inference_battery.py --tier trained --rung {lora,frozen_probe} --sources notinject,xstest,jbb_behaviors,bipia,injecagent against the now-uploaded checkpoints, (3) rsync DOWN 120 OOD prediction parquets (60 LoRA + 60 frozen-probe). LoRA OOD inference: 58.4s wall × A100; frozen-probe OOD inference: 39.8s wall × A100. Both completed cleanly; FUSE only broke on the giant atomic full-FT checkpoint write. ADR-018 OOD slate now ships with 2 trained rungs (frozen-probe + LoRA) + 1 classical floor (tfidf-lr) + 2 reference scorers (protectai-v1 + protectai-v2) = 5 rungs vs original 6-rung plan (full-FT dropped). ADR-018 supersession pending Phase 5 close. Pod 4fhhhcpu0utbvp deleted 2026-05-18T07:41Z after final rsync verified.
